# blender-mcp (v0.5.0)
> **AI-Powered 3D Creation Hub** - Comprehensive FastMCP 3.2.0 server for 3D modeling, animation, and scene management in Blender.

This project uses the SOTA 14.1 Industrial Quality Stack (Ruff + Biome) and follows strict JSON-RPC protocol compliance.

## Docs
- [Readme](README.md): Main project overview, architecture, and Industrial Quality Stack documentation.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Detailed history of releases and transitions.
- [Development](docs/development/README.md): Best practices for AI-assisted development in this repository.
- [MCP Technical](docs/mcp-technical/README.md): Detailed technical spec for the Blender-MCP bridge and session management.
- [Repository Protection](docs/repository-protection/README.md): Guide to maintaining repository integrity and safety.

## Examples
- [Examples](examples/): Example code and implementations
- [Examples](docs\EXAMPLES.md): Example usage and code samples

## Configuration
- [Pyproject](pyproject.toml): Python project configuration and dependencies
- [Package](webapp\frontend\package.json): Node.js project configuration and dependencies
- [Cargo](Cargo.toml): Rust project configuration and dependencies
- [Config](.git\config): Application configuration files

## Optional
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Project changelog information
- [License](LICENSE): Project license information
